## Quotation candidates (auto excerpt)

**civ-22 (excerpt):** - **Chronology vs cosmology:** Bible is not history or pure fiction; it's cosmology — constructed to serve legitimacy, cohesion, differentiation. - **Legitimacy:** Poet God (Yahweh creates by speaking) + poet King (David); four covenants, David's unconditional; "in the beginning there was the word." - **Cohesion:** Synchronization — Abraham/Isaac/Jacob = three tribes merged; Moses = Egyptian pries…
